text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship is right around the corner!
King is planning to run too, but lately she's been
on a losing streak...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She challenges me to a scrimmage, even though
she's already tired after running in a race today. I
end up winning pretty soundly, but King's not
ready to give up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She shows me that her charm is rooted in her
unflagging tenacity! Realizing that, I see that
there was never any reason for me to worry about
her!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In fact, she's a goddess in the flesh! I'm gonna do
my best in the Mile Championship so I can do her
proud!
